entry.content:
• Updated Windows PuTTY executables to version 0.83.
  • This includes a fix for the issue reported at https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/515628403.
  • Fixed issue where gcloud compute scp file transfers were extremely slow when using --tunnel-through-iap in PY 3.14.
entry.summary: Updated PuTTY to version 0.83 and fixed slow file transfers with `gcloud compute scp` when using `--tunnel-through-iap` in Python 3.14. This release also addresses a reported issue in PuTTY.
entry.title: Google Cloud CLI: CLI update and SCP fix

entry.content:
• Added flag --labels to gcloud alloydb instances create|create-secondary commands to assign labels to an instance.
  • Added flags --update-labels, --remove-labels, and --clear-labels to gcloud alloydb instances update commands to update, remove, or clear labels for an instance.
entry.summary: You can now assign, update, remove, or clear labels for your AlloyDB instances using new flags in the `gcloud alloydb instances` commands. This allows for better organization and management of your database resources.
entry.title: AlloyDB: Manage AlloyDB instance labels

entry.summary: BigLake's Hive tables functionality has been promoted to beta. This allows for easier management and querying of Hive tables within BigLake, improving data integration and accessibility.
entry.title: BigLake: BigLake Hive tables enter beta

entry.content:
• Added --confidential-compute-type flag to gcloud dataproc clusters create to allow specifying the Confidential Computing technology (e.g., SEV, SEV_SNP, TDX).
  • Deprecated --confidential-compute flag for gcloud dataproc clusters create. Use --confidential-compute-type flag instead.
entry.summary: You can now specify Confidential Computing technologies like SEV, SEV_SNP, or TDX when creating Dataproc clusters using the new --confidential-compute-type flag. The older --confidential-compute flag is now deprecated.
entry.title: Cloud Dataproc: Confidential Computing for Dataproc

entry.content: • Added --sql-where-clause flag to gcloud datastream objects start-backfill, which starts a partial backfill on the specified object.
entry.summary: Datastream now supports partial backfills for objects. You can use the new --sql-where-clause flag with the gcloud datastream objects start-backfill command to specify a subset of data to backfill.
entry.title: Cloud Datastream: Datastream adds partial backfill support

entry.content:
• Added gcloud netapp volumes start-split and get-split-status commands to alpha and beta tracks of the volumes group.
  • Added gcloud netapp storage-pool update-backup-config command to GA track.
  • Added --ontap-source flag to gcloud netapp backup-vaults backups create GA track.
  • Added gcloud netapp storage-pools list-backup-configs command to the GA track of the storage-pools group.
  • Added gcloud netapp storage-pools restore-volume command to GA track.
entry.summary: New commands for managing NetApp volumes, backups, and storage pools are now available. This update includes volume split management, backup configuration updates, and volume restoration capabilities, with features rolling out across alpha, beta, and GA tracks.
entry.title: Cloud NetApp: Cloud NetApp Enhancements

entry.content: • Added regional endpoint support for gcloud beta run worker-pools and gcloud beta run jobs executions tasks commands. Specify --endpoint-mode=regional or --endpoint-mode=regional-preferred to make API requests with regional endpoints.
entry.summary: Cloud Run jobs now support regional endpoints for worker pools and job executions. This allows for more localized API requests by specifying `--endpoint-mode=regional` or `--endpoint-mode=regional-preferred`.
entry.title: Cloud Run: Regional endpoints for Cloud Run jobs

entry.content: • Updated 'cloud-sql-proxy' packaged component to use 2.22.0 of the Cloud SQL Proxy.
entry.summary: The Cloud SQL Proxy has been updated to version 2.22.0. This update includes the latest improvements and features for connecting to your Cloud SQL instances securely and reliably.
entry.title: Cloud SQL: Cloud SQL Proxy Updated

entry.content: • Added --set-object-acls-from-file flag to gcloud storage batch-operations jobs create.
entry.summary: You can now use the `--set-object-acls-from-file` flag with `gcloud storage batch-operations jobs create` to manage object Access Control Lists (ACLs) more efficiently. This new option allows you to specify ACLs for multiple objects directly from a file, simplifying batch operations and improving management of access permissions.
entry.title: Cloud Storage: Manage object ACLs from a file

entry.content: • Promoted --source-machine-image and --source-machine-image-disk-device-name flags for gcloud compute disks create in beta.
entry.summary: You can now create Compute Engine disks directly from machine images using the new `--source-machine-image` and `--source-machine-image-disk-device-name` flags in `gcloud compute disks create`. These flags are available in beta.
entry.title: Compute Engine: Create disks from machine images

entry.content:
• Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security security-profiles commands (delete, describe, export, import, list) to GA.
  • Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security security-profiles custom-intercept commands (create, delete, describe, list, update) to GA.
  • Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security security-profiles custom-mirroring commands (create, delete, describe, list, update) to GA.
  • Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security security-profiles threat-prevention commands (add-override, create, delete, delete-override, describe, list, list-overrides, update-override) to GA.
  • Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security security-profiles url-filtering commands (create, delete, describe, list) to GA.
  • Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security security-profile-groups commands (create, delete, describe, list, update) to GA.

Subscribe to these release notes at https://groups.google.com/forum/#!forum/google-cloud-sdk-announce.
entry.summary: Project scoping for several network security gcloud commands, including security profiles, custom mirroring, threat prevention, and URL filtering, has been promoted to General Availability. This enhancement allows for more granular control and management of your network security configurations within specific projects.
entry.title: Network Security: Network Security Command Scoping Now Generally Available
